compiled_state.title: [ticket link]: LINK.json files not auto-committed after creation -> untracked files remain in .tickets-tracker/
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
### 2. Incident Overview

* **Scenario Type:** User-Flagged Behavior

#### Expected Behavior

After running \`.claude/scripts/dso ticket link <src> <tgt> <relation>\`, the resulting LINK.json event file should be automatically committed and pushed to the \`tickets\` orphan branch, consistent with the behavior of other ticket operations (create, comment, transition) which auto-commit their event files.

#### Actual Behavior

The LINK.json files are written to \`.tickets-tracker/\` as untracked files but are not committed or pushed. They remain invisible to other sessions until a manual \`git -C .tickets-tracker add -A && git -C .tickets-tracker commit && git push\` is performed. During a preplanning session for epic 16f8-4b57, 11 LINK files (dependency links across 5 stories) accumulated as untracked files and required a manual commit + pull --rebase + push sequence to persist.

### 3. Action History and Workarounds

* Ran \`.claude/scripts/dso ticket link\` 11 times to add story dependencies
* Observed via \`git status --short\` in the tickets worktree that all LINK.json files were untracked
* Workaround: \`git -C .tickets-tracker add -A && git -C .tickets-tracker commit -m "ticket: LINK stories for epic 16f8-4b57 preplanning"\`
* Remote had diverged; required \`git pull origin tickets --rebase\` before push succeeded

### 4. Technical Environment

* Ticket CLI: \`.claude/scripts/dso ticket link\`
* Affected directory: \`.tickets-tracker/\` (tickets orphan branch worktree)
* Other ticket subcommands (create, comment, transition) auto-commit their event files via the ticket system's event-sourced write path; \`link\` does not.

comments.body: Investigation complete. ROOT_CAUSE: ticket-graph.py _write_link_event() writes LINK.json to disk without calling write_commit_event() from ticket-lib.sh, so no git add + git commit is performed after file creation — leaving LINK events as untracked files. Confidence: high. Fix: inline flock+git-add+git-commit in ticket-graph.py _write_link_event() matching ticket-link.sh pattern. Testing_mode: RED (need test confirming LINK events appear in git log after ticket link).
comments.author: Test
